FI-110 FLASK pattern shop & foundry instrument
1   Master object
Drop an STL here or click to choose a file
FLASK works in millimetres. Everything downstream (walls, draft, shrink) assumes mm.
2   Pull direction & parting
Draft and undercuts are judged relative to this axis. Reorienting the pull is the first fix when the part locks.
Where the mold splits (two-piece) or where the open-face block is cut. Default is the part's mid-plane; the maximal cross-section is often better.
3   Mold type
Two-piece: part split along the parting plane into mating halves with keys, sprue and vents. For full 3D objects.
Casting: gravity-poured polyurethane. Halves named cope (upper) and drag (lower).
4   Shrink compensation
The cavity is scaled up so the cooled/cured part lands on size. Resin barely shrinks; semi-crystalline plastics shrink most.
5   Mold body
Wall is the minimum solid land around the part. The flange is the flat clamping land around the parting silhouette; the block footprint provides it.
6   Draft, keys, sprue, vents
Walls flatter than this against the pull are flagged. Automatic draft ADDITION on arbitrary meshes is a v1.1 target; v1.0 measures and flags (see Known Limitations).
One half gets bosses, the other sockets cut larger by this clearance so the halves seat without binding. The layout is asymmetric so they mate one way only.
A funnel at the cavity high point for gravity pouring. Injection mode uses a narrow gate plus a runner stub instead.
Thin channels at other cavity high points let trapped air escape, with small overflow reservoirs to feed shrinkage.
Load a master object to begin.

Draft & undercut analysis
Load a part and set the pull direction. Analysis colours the mesh and reports the minimum draft.
Draftable toward pull (opens cleanly)
Draftable toward the opposite half
Low-draft wall (below threshold)
Undercut (traps the part in a rigid mold)
Result
No mold generated yet.
Export
STL is exported per mold piece, named by role. The session captures pull direction, parting and every parameter for re-import.
